Patch Set 10: Code-Review-1

Di I rebased this patch, and it appears to apply cleanly, but could you or Sarah please fix up the few problems I pointed out in the previous inspection of this patch.

I think that my investigation on LU-4420 shows that there are some race conditions in DNE recovery that need to be fixed, and getting this patch tested, passing, and landed would go a long way to ensuring it keeps working.

parents.subject: LU-3289 ssk: fix SK_IV_REV_START on 32-bit systems

commit.subject: LU-1187 dne: add striped dir test to recovery-xxx-scale
commit.message:
LU-1187 dne: add striped dir test to recovery-xxx-scale

1. Add index to start_client_loads, so it will create
striped directories(with default stripeEA) for all of
tests.
2. Add create striped directory for each run_xxx, once it
finds the test is being run on a mulitple MDT environment.
3. Add run_lfs to test remote directory create/unlink
during failover.
4. Checking other MDT imports status to be FULL before
doing failover.

Test-Parameters: alwaysuploadlogs envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,REQFAIL=100,DURATION=7200,LOADS=lfs mdssizegb=10 ostsizegb=10 austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 testlist=recovery-mds-scale,recovery-random-scale,recovery-double-scale
Signed-off-by: Wang Di <di.wang@intel.com>
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
Change-Id: I3790715d35cfa82a32df6f17e413b6be1588d901
